title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at TVS Motor International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at TVS Motor International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, TVS Motor International Enterprises in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About TVS Motor International Enterprises:
TVS Motor International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor International Enterprises!
